title: Noah Lucas homepage v036 correct resume plus appendix system
changeSummary: Aligns the homepage to the linked Google Docs resume default tab, v01 Mission-Critical Machines.

Uses the exact resume header and strapline: Product Executive | AI-Native Machines & Mission-Critical Data Infrastructure; I help design, build, validate, and operate intelligent systems in DDIL, edge, and frontier environments.
Adds the Appendix product leadership system: R&D / field signal through product thesis, customer promise, roadmap, design, validation, GTM, operations, and evidence.
Adds the T-shaped executive breadth/depth profile and six employer role fingerprints with visual comparison charts.
Keeps the standalone Product Thesis section removed, preserves rounded glass, and keeps the Sift / Anduril / Serve / Postmates mobile logo strip.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at desktop and narrow responsive viewports; DOM order, section presence, overflow, visual screenshots, and console checks.
checks: Hero uses the linked resume default tab header, domains, and strapline; strapline is before the CTA buttons.
Appendix-derived product system, T-shaped profile, and six role fingerprint cards are present in the visible section order before selected work.
The standalone Product Thesis section is absent; Product Thesis appears only as a process step in the appendix system motion.
Desktop and narrow layouts render without material horizontal overflow; the known one-pixel refractive sampler overflow remains unchanged.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
